headline: Nomura Core Equity Fund: Q4 2025 Buys, Sells, And Standouts
summary: Nomura Core Equity Fund underperformed the S&P 500 in Q4 2025 due to stock selection. Read the full analysis for more details.

headline: RBC Capital Flags Iran Conflict Risk to Sherwin-Williams Margins (SHW)
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 15 Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Income. On March 19, RBC Capital lowered its price recommendation on The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) to $376 from $390. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The analyst said the company’s markets still look choppy. If the Iran conflict […]
